Five commands. One live site.

Clodsite is a structured, interview-first workflow for building and deploying websites with Claude Code. No autocomplete, no magic. Just a clean process that works.

Clone the repo, open Claude Code, and follow the prompts. In about twenty minutes you'll have a spec you approved, a site you reviewed, and a live URL. That's the whole thing.

$ git clone https://github.com/nopolabs/clodsite my-site
$ cd my-site
$ claude
> /setup       # verify your Cloudflare token
> /interview   # 10 questions → site-spec.json
> /plan        # review copy before anything is built
> /build       # generate templates, run Eleventy
> /deploy      # ship to Cloudflare Pages → live URL

Clodsite labels every step [SCRIPT], [LLM], or [HYBRID]. Scripts handle the deterministic work — free, fast, and reliable. Claude inference runs only where reasoning is actually needed. You can see exactly where the AI is and isn't involved.

Get Started →
